description: This file defines the CalculatorActivity class for an Android calculator application. It manages UI interactions, input handling, and performs basic arithmetic operations, updating the display accordingly.

classes.name: CalculatorActivity
classes.description: An Android Activity implementing calculator functionalities including input handling, arithmetic operations, and display rendering.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, binds button click listeners, and sets up the calculator UI.

methods.name: bindAppend
methods.description: Binds a digit or decimal point button to append its character to the current input.

methods.name: bindOp
methods.description: Binds an operation button (+, -, *, /) to set the pending operation.

methods.name: onAppend
methods.description: Handles appending a digit or decimal point to the current input.

methods.name: onOperation
methods.description: Handles setting a pending operation and updating the accumulator based on current input.

methods.name: onEquals
methods.description: Performs the calculation based on the current input, accumulator, and pending operation.

methods.name: onClear
methods.description: Resets calculator state to initial values.

methods.name: applyOp
methods.description: Executes an arithmetic operation on two Double values. Returns null on division by zero.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Updates the display TextView with the current calculator state.

methods.name: renderError
methods.description: Displays an error message and resets state after an invalid operation.

methods.name: format
methods.description: Formats a Double as a string, removing decimal if the number is whole.
